Mods.Name: Achievements
Mods.Author: M-
Mods.Description:
An achievement system with unlock notifications, progress tracking, and mod integration support.

Features:
- Core achievements for vanilla gameplay
- Progress bars and secret achievements
- Searchable UI with sorting options
- Notification and sound on unlock
- API for other mods to add their own achievements

For modders looking to integrate, read this: https://github.com/OfficiallyM/Achievements/blob/master/docs/Modding.md

Mods.Name: The Long Who
Mods.Author: M-
Mods.Description:
Bringing the world of Doctor Who to The Long Drive

Currently adds:
- Functional TARDIS with teleportation, setting custom destinations, manual flight and more
- Sonic Screwdriver (chance to replace the fly swatter, 'legycsapo')
  - Summon your TARDIS
  - Scan objects
  - Destroy/repair electrics
  - Break crates
- Weeping angels
  - Don't turn your back. Don't look away. And don't blink. Good Luck.
- Regeneration
  - Survive death, but change your face

Planned future features:
- Further TARDIS functionality
  - Energy usage and recharging
  - Health system
  - Hostile Action Displacement System (HADS)
  - Shields
    - Disabling shields would allow munkas/bunnies/other enemies to enter the control room
  - + More
- Improved TARDIS interior interaction
- More sonic modes
- More enemies

Frequently Asked Questions
Where do I get a TARDIS then?
- Summon one using a Sonic Screwdriver

What if I lose my sonic?
- You can just find a new one, the TARDIS is linked to you, not the sonic itself

How do I kill the Weeping Angel?
- Can you kill stone?

Mods.Name: Car Batteries
Mods.Author: RUNDEN, M-
Mods.Description:
Started by RUNDEN, finished by M-

- Adds car battery slots to every vehicle excluding bikes
- Batteries have a chance to replace cigarettes
- Leaving your electrics on will drain the battery
Mods.Changelog:
- Fix for mysterious cubes appearing throughout the world
- Fix for UFO EMP not working
- Added push starting
  - If the battery has more than 9 volts, the engine can start normally
  - If the battery has between 3 and 9 volts, the engine won't start if the vehicle is stationary, instead you need to be rolling for the vehicle to start
  - If the battery has less than 3 volts, even push starting won't start the engine

Mods.Name: World Tweaker
Mods.Author: M-
Mods.Description:
Alter the world however you want it

Allows you to alter the following world settings:
- Road length
  - Less than 5,000 km roads won't count towards the Long Driver role
- Straight or normal roads
- Building density
- Object density
  - Small rocks, cacti, foliage, etc
- Large rock density
- Item spawn rate
  - Controls the amount of items that spawn in buildings and buried underground
  - This also works for SgtJoe's Points of Interest mod buildings
- Fluid amount
  - Controls the quantity of fluids that spawn in containers and building taps
- Crate modifier
  - Allows modifying crates to reduce the quantity of items and randomise their conditions
- World type
  - Flat worlds
  - Vanilla world
  - Canyon - The road spawns in a canyon deep beneath the surface
  - Road bridge - The road is suspended on ground high above the surface

Settings accessible by clicking 'Start' on the main menu
Cannot be applied to existing saves, except for item settings
Mods.Changelog: Fixes settings persisting through save loads in the same session

Mods.Name: Gauge Tank Sync
Mods.Author: M-
Mods.Description: Small mod that syncs the vanilla vehicle fuel gauges max value with the size of the fuel tank, allowing you to have accurate fuel readings with a gauge from a different vehicle

Mods.Name: Hud Odometer
Mods.Author: QuantumRage
Mods.Description: Simple HUD display that tracks distance from the starter house

Mods.Name: Hall-Scott 480 Peterbilt truck engine
Mods.Author: Molly_Dawn
Mods.Description:
This mod adds the Hall-Scott 480 Peterbilt truck engine (1940-1950's) as a possible spawn replacement for the bus engine.

(currently uses ikarus engine model and modified vanilla sounds)

This engine is meant to be slow, but powerful. Due to the torque it may be somewhat faster than the ikarus engine in some cases (uphill) but otherwise should be more or less the same speed, just noticeably more torque.  Uses more oil and fuel to balance it.

Runs on Gasoline,  This is one of the largest gasoline engines ever built, also one of the last gasoline big truck engines, before all truck manufacturers switched to more economical diesel engines.

Mods.Name: RundenToolGun
Mods.Author: RUNDEN
Mods.Description: Tool gun from Garry's Mod. Replaces some revolvers. Use PageUp/PageDown to cycle through the menu. First Left Click to select an item, second left click to apply the action to an item. Z to undo

Mods.Name: [AMT] Spoilers
Mods.Author: PPSz
Mods.Description:
!! If you have a Workshop version UNDER 8.6.3, download Advanced Modding Toolkit to use this mod!
- Spawn randomly at most points of the interests
- Can be spawned using M-ultitool
- Orientation of the spoiler doesn't matter, it'll always apply downforce related to the car's position
- Downforce increases with speed ofc
- Downforce can be disabled in mod settings
- Some spoilers are paintable, some are not, but all can have different conditions
- Condition affects downforce (worse condition = less downforce)

Mods.Name: [AMT] Fauxlaroid PrintCam - instant camera mod
Mods.Author: PPSz
Mods.Description:
!! If you have a Workshop version UNDER 8.6.3, download Advanced Modding Toolkit to use this mod!
- Cameras can be found at most points of interests. Diners and Cabins have the highest chance
- At the start of new game the camera spawns on the bed
- Each camera can take 10 pictures without a way to reload
- Pictures are stored in Documents/TheLongDrive/Screenshots with PrintCam_ prefix
- in mod settings (under M button) you can choose file type of saved pictures
- Those pictures can be replaced to put custom pictures into the game
- Pictures can be attached anywhere
- You can write text on the picture (text can't be edited later)
- Toggleable postprocessing for pictures in mod settings (under M button)
- Selfie mode - just point the camera at yourself. Mirror on the front will start working and the hand position will switch to not block the view

Keybinds:
When holding the camera
L - toggle flash (configurable in mod settings under M button)
Left mouse button - take a picture
Right mouse button - look through viewfinder (when equipped)

When holding a picture:
K - start editing text (configurable in mod settings under M button)
Enter - confirm
Escape - cancel (opens the main menu)

Mods.Name: [AMT] Little Bird - helicopter mod
Mods.Author: PPSz
Mods.Description:
!! If you have a Workshop version UNDER 8.6.3, download Advanced Modding Toolkit to use this mod!
I present you the Little Bird, a small and lightweight military helicopter
- Progress with the helicopter isn't tracked
- Colliding with rotor blades will make them explode
- Runs on diesel, but adding other fluids except water and blood will only reduce the performance slightly

Controls:
W/S/A/D - Cyclic
Up/Down arrows - Throttle (throttle up starts the engine)
Space/Ctrl - Collective
Left/Right arrows - Pedals

Mods.Name: [AMT] Roof racks & Light bars
Mods.Author: PPSz
Mods.Description:
!! If you have a Workshop version UNDER 8.6.3, download Advanced Modding Toolkit to use this mod!
- both roof racks and light bars have variable conditions, made either from dark or light metal
- roof racks have working physlock
- roof racks come in three sizes and each size has two variants - with lights and without lights
- light bars (this includes roof racks with lights) have slots for headlights
- there are two variants of headlight slots - 4 round and 3 square headlights
- headlights are synced with car's lights
- headlights will fall off on impact
- headlights colors can be changed in M-ultitool
- both roof racks and light bars can be found at various points of interests

Mods.Name: [AMT] Spare Wheel Straps
Mods.Author: PPSz
Mods.Description:
!! If you have a Workshop version UNDER 8.6.3, download Advanced Modding Toolkit to use this mod!
- compatible with all wheels - regular, whitewalls, bike or bus (the bus wheels don't look as good tho)
- straps can be found randomly in the wild at most points of interests. Garages and gas stations have the highest chance to spawn them
- straps have variable conditions - can be cleaned with jizz-o-nit and sponges, but at the moment it's only cosmetic

fun fact: this was my first mod idea, so I started making mods, just because I wanted to make a mod like this. Tbf, my original idea was significantly worse than this, but the goal was to have a mounting point for a spare wheel

Mods.Name: Advanced Modding Toolkit [AMT]
Mods.Author: PPSz
Mods.Description: Required for [AMT] mods to work

Mods.Name: TLDPlus
Mods.Author: M-
Mods.Description:
Features:
- Uses a modular system with each module able to be turned on or off on the fly, and have their available settings changed
- Custom settings UI available from the default mod settings (M key mod list > Find TLDPlus > Settings)

Available modules:
- Better tank caps
- Makes tank caps show fluids with a percentage lower than 1%, vanilla game hides those normally
- Shows capacity and percentage to two decimal places allowing for more controlled pouring
- Hold to shit
- Tired of spamming B to have a shit? Now you can hold it instead
- Better tumbleweeds
- Limits the amount of tumbleweeds which can spawn to a configurable amount (defaults to 20)
- Changing vehicle max speed cap (defaults to 1500km/h)
Mods.Changelog: Support for changing max vehicle speed cap, defaulting to 1500km/h instead of the vanilla 720km/h

Mods.Name: Nitrous
Mods.Author: M-
Mods.Description:
Features:
- 5 sizes of nitrous bottles, replacing the soda siphon
- Size is put on the bottom of the bottle. 1 is smallest, 5 is biggest
- Like the turbo mod you can mount the bottle, except you can mount it anywhere on, or anything attached to the car
- Nitrous key is **R** by default but can be configured in the mod settings (M key > Find 'Nitrous' > Settings)
- It increases engine power, boosts the RPMs a little bit for some more initial oomph
- While active it also increases fuel consumption and temperature
- Bottles drain at a constant rate, with drain being evenly distributed across any mounted bottles
- Bottle size only affects capacity, not boost amount. A size 1 bottle will provide the same boost as a size 5, just for less overall time
- Each mounted bottle adds more boost, but it's not just a x2 for each bottle, you'll hit a point of diminishing returns after a certain number (idk what) to keep it balanced
- Blue smoke is emitted from the car when nitrous is active
- Gas hiss noise when nitrous is active
- Look at a tank to show how much is left
Mods.Changelog:
- Added boost gauge, replacing palack01, the silver tank with the red stripe

- Turned down hiss sound effect volume
- Turned down engine temp gain
- Fixed a bug when attaching nitrous to your starting vehicle
- Fixed not being able to turn collisions off for nitrous bottles
- Fixed not being able to detach bottles after saving with them attached
- Fixed nitrous system breaking two-stroke fuel consumption
- Fixed starter house not correctly spawning nitrous bottles
- Fixed starter house nitrous bottles spawning with more nitrous than the max capacity

Mods.Name: Barkas Transporter Physlock
Mods.Author: PPSz
Mods.Description:
Adds car locking mechanism to Barkas Transporter
To lock the car:
1. Place the car on top of the ramp
2. Make sure the car is completely on the ramp and doesn't stick out too much
3. Close the ramp
The car's carscript will be disabled, so engine will stop running and you won't be able to operate the wheel, lights, handbrake, etc.
Also the lock needs a second or two to take effect when loading the save, so better not save a game upside down

Mods.Name: Wearable Headlights
Mods.Author: QuantumRage
Mods.Description:
This is a simple mod that lets you *equip* the round car headlights as *HeadLamps*

You can toggle the Head Light by using L (rebind able in settings menu)

The position and size of the headlamp is adjustable

you can wear a hat, sunglasses and smoke a cigarette while using your headlamp

Headlamp will turn off automatically when you enter a car

Mods.Name: Better Vehicle Physics
Mods.Author: M-
Mods.Description:
Do you get tired of vehicles bouncing on the ground after hitting a rock? This mod aims to fix that.

Designed to improve the way vehicles react whilst in the air, which should give a more realistic feel when jumping off a hill/ramp or after hitting a rock

It isn't perfect, but it's significantly better (I can't fix all the jank, i'm not a miracle worker)

Want to mess with the settings? Hit the M key, find 'Better Vehicle Physics' and hit settings. There you'll find settings for every value this mod alters
Mods.Changelog: Improved physics settings now also apply to items attached to the car, not just the car itself

Mods.Name: Long Haul Overhaul
Mods.Author: QuantumRage, Wisher
Mods.Description:
fixing The Long Drive one haul at a time.

Features:

Sway Reduction
Cuts down trailer sway for steady towing.
Dynamic and configurable stabilization.

Trailer Brakes
Adds brake support to trailers.
Syncs with tow car brakes or a custom keybind.

Traction Control
Boosts traction to reduce wheel slip.
Grip adjusts based on slip, with configurable settings.

Auto-Shift Fixes
Improves auto-shift for smoother gear changes.
Includes RPM Target and Max Torque modes, fully adjustable.

Miscellaneous
Includes many additional small fixes and tweaks.

 Possible Future Features:

Bike stabilization and fixes.
Sync fuel/oil gauges with tank or engine size.
Optional trip meter syncing for distance driven.
Hose/siphon fixes (because its a mess).
Multiple config presets for custom setups.
Mods.Changelog:
Performance optimisations
Bug fixes
Physics improvements
Auto shifting improvements

Mods.Name: Company Cruiser (Lethal Company)
Mods.Author: RUNDEN
Mods.Description:
This mod adds the 'Company Cruiser' truck from the game Lethal Company!
The truck is driveable and will spawn in places that Trabant Kombi's will also spawn.

The engine can be difficult to start sometimes, keep cranking and try again and it will start eventuall.

The truck has an automatic CVT gearbox!
Look down at the center console and move the shifter to the 'D' position to get moving by pressing the USE button and moving the mouse.
Make sure to put the shifter to 'P' to allow the engine to start.
Don't rev the engine too much in 'P'!

The engine is a 13.8L turbine engine
It uses 99% gas and 1% oil.
The fuel tank is mounted on the right hand side of the truck in the middle lower of the sill.
Hold SHIFT for sport mode!

The truck features a jumping mechanism (only works in drive) operated by a button on the dashboard.
There is also an ejector seat button next to the ignition key.

If the truck gets damaged you can fix it with a sponge or spray bottle, a brush will damage it.

All credit to the game Lethal Company for the 3D model ported from the game as well as the audio effects.

Mods.Name: Too stroke for two-stroke
Mods.Author: PPSz
Mods.Description: Changes all two-stroke engines into four-stroke with a makeshift oil tank made from an old oil can. Compatible with some engine related mods like Flexible Fuel Vehicles or Cassidy's Oil Barkas
Mods.Changelog: doubled the oil tank pour rate, mod will work on a new game without reloading a save

Mods.Name: Performance Booster
Mods.Author: PPSz
Mods.Description:
Goal of this mod is to increase performance of the game. It's aimed for low end PCs, but contains optimizations that can be useful on high end PCs as well 

Features:
- Customizable using mod settings (press M, find Performance Booster and click Settings button)
- Texture quality options
- Lower quality options for shadows
- Disable shadows of small car parts (e.g. headlights, gauges, hubcaps)
- Added slider to change amount of light sources
- Low quality reflections and smoke
- Optimized double headlights - instead of two light sources, double headlights will emit one light with increased intensity
- Optimized binoculars - removed image on lenses and removed camera effects when zoomed in
- Remove ragdolls  of munkas and bunnies after they die
- Remove various items from the game (for example books, chairs, poop)
Mods.Changelog:
- Fixed light intensity on double headlamps not being applied correctly
- Added SgtJoe's Sniper compatibility. Binoculars optimization is disabled when SgtJoe's Sniper is installed, but the optimization still can be forced in mod settings (but it'll still break the Sniper scope ofc)

Mods.Name: Tumpy Graphics
Mods.Author: Tumpy_Noodles
Mods.Description:
- Gives Reflectable Objects Around the player Reflections.
 - Metallic objects are shiny at all times and windows have reflections
- By default set to Real Time Reflections.
 - Can set to Static Reflections
 - Static Reflections don't look good at the Moment. Sorry.
- Low Quality Setting to make certain things Lower Quality
 - Reflections
 - Shadows
 - Smoke
- Go back to Main Menu for Settings to take effect

Mods.Name: Kuri Oil Gauge
Mods.Author: Kuri
Mods.Description: Adds some new oil gauges to the game.
Mods.Changelog:
Fixed gauge disappearing from M-ultiTool items list after going back to the main menu
Properly supports mounting to objects attached to the car or mounted car parts
Gauge now sits at zero until the ignition is on

Mods.Name: Radiation
Mods.Author: M-, TR
Mods.Description:
Full new gameplay system adding background radiation, radioactive items and anti-radiation meds

- Randomised background radiation levels based on seed
- Items can be irradiated with metallic items having a higher chance of being irradiated than non-metallic items
- Buildings can be radioactive, safe zones or neither
  - Starter house is always a safe zone
- Radiation poisoning
  - Prolonged exposure to radiation causes radiation poisoning, dealing damage over time
  - Radiation poisoning will dissipate slowly over time while not near sources of radiation
- RadAway syringe
  - Replaces the bread roll zsemle
  - Inject to dissipate radiation quicker but gives you sickness
- RadResist syringe
  - Replaces the bread roll zsemle
  - Inject to increase radiation resistance, slowing radiation poisoning but making you more hungry and thirsty while active
- Geiger counter
  - Replaces the compass ww2compass
  - Tracks radiation levels
- Munkas and rabbits can get radiation poisoning giving them unique effects over their non-irradiated counterparts
-  Settings for:
  - Radiation poison multiplier
  - Radiation dissipation multiplier
  - Disabling radiation until you find a geiger counter
- Radiation poison saves both for player and NPCs
Mods.Changelog:
- Huge performance improvements (sorry, it was making the game lag!)
- Fixed a bug causing objects to not be radioactive properly
   - You'll now probably get radiation showing on existing saves where you didn't before
- New debug tools
  - Available in the mod settings (M key > Find 'Radiation' > Settings)
   - Show radiation levels of the object you're holding/looking at
   - Useful to find sources of radiation in existing saves
- Disable radiation until you find a geiger counter now defaults to on

Mods.Name: MoreUFOs
Mods.Author: M-
Mods.Description:
Is the vanilla green UFO too boring? Have some more!

Adds six new UFO types including the red UFO

If you have the red UFO mod, I recommend uninstalling it as you'll get the red UFO more often than you should otherwise

Current available colours:
- Red
- Yellow
- Magenta
- Pink, white and blue
- Blue
- Brown
Mods.Changelog:
Fix for UFOs spawning with multiple types, causing effects to show with the wrong colour UFO
Added three new UFO types:
- Rainbow
- Tumbleweed
- Tempus

Mods.Name: M-ultiTool
Mods.Author: M-
Mods.Description:
Vehicle/item spawner, gameplay customisation and mod development tools

Open using F1 by default, this can be rebound via the pause menu or mod settings (top left of UI)

Formerly SpawnerTLD - Same great mod, just with a new name and some fresh features
Mods.Changelog:
Fixed a bug on the vehicle configuration fluids tab causing the tab to be disabled
Complete rework of how the wheel tuning data saves
This will mean any wheel tuning from v4.0.0 will be reset, sorry!
This was required to fix an issue where switching vehicle wheels after applying tuning would lose the tuning
Setting the fuel tank to the correct fluids now works better for two-stroke engines
Fixed vehicles with modifications applied having the modifications reset after driving far enough away that the vehicle despawns
Reworked the material changer data saving to fix materials not always being applied correctly, or applying to the wrong parts on save load

Mods.Name: Spooky Scary Skeleton
Mods.Author: PPSz
Mods.Description: Spooky Scary Skeleton

Mods.Name: Superchargers Mod
Mods.Author: Platinum
Mods.Description:
Overhauled as of March 27, 2025
Modeled and rewritten by Platinum.
This works by boosting your engine directly from your rpm, this means it boosts consistently and with no lag. It replaces some metal bars (30% chance to replace them.) Press G to attach the supercharger to your engine (KEEP IN MIND THAT SOME MODDED ENGINES DO NOT ALLOW FOR ANY ATTACHMENTS.) They will spawn as five different sizes, which will output different power. TO CHANGE SUPERCHARGER VOLUME: press M while in-game to view your mod list and scroll to superchargers, there will be a yellow settings button by which you will find the volume slider, ranging from completely muted to default volume.
Mods.Changelog:
Completely overhauled supercharger model, actually has textures now, looks like metal, etc.
Added setting to change volume (default is 1)
Butterfly valves open via throttle rather than rpm
Collisions are more accurate and scale properly with the object
Superchargers now have five preset sizes
Superchargers will now have more weight that scales with their size

Mods.Name: Advanced Weather
Mods.Author: SgtJoe
Mods.Description: Adds 6 types of dynamic weather to the game, adds windshield wipers to all cars that you can activate with T, and fixes all issues with time freezing/skipping. Open the Mod Settings menu to customize the chance of each weather type, as well as enable/disable their negative effects.

Mods.Name: Item Inspector
Mods.Author: SgtJoe
Mods.Description: Adds a magnifying glass which you can equip with Tab and then left click while aiming at an item to display helpful information such as condition, weight, engine fuel, radiator cooling power, paint can color, and more! Has a 40% chance to replace the flat flashlight. Has a Mod Config option to display item names as they appear in the Spawner.
Mods.Changelog:
- Fixed rare crash when inspecting modded items
- Fixed outline appearing on the player
- Cleaned up errant script that was causing log spam

Mods.Name: Fugitive Mod
Mods.Author: SgtJoe
Mods.Description:
The AI police will now pursue you relentlessly as long as you're in a vehicle!
THIS MOD REQUIRES 'AI TRAFFIC' (RUNDEN_AI.DLL)

Mods.Name: Progress Tracker
Mods.Author: SgtJoe
Mods.Description:
Always accurately displays your progress along the road no matter if you're in a vehicle or on foot. 
Has a 40% chance to replace the compass.
Mods.Changelog: Fixed performance issues

Mods.Name: Thermometer
Mods.Author: SgtJoe
Mods.Description: Displays the ambient air temperature that affects your engine heat. Has a 60% chance to replace the water level.

Mods.Name: Bike Jitter Fix
Mods.Author: SgtJoe
Mods.Description: The first person camera will no longer rapidly shake back and forth while riding two-wheeled vehicles.
Mods.Changelog: - Added stability values to Mod Config

Mods.Name: Red UFO
Mods.Author: TumRunFreakSheep
Mods.Description:
Standalone version of the red UFO from the BetterCrates mod
More destructive version of the green UFO
Great for some action in your game!

Mods.Name: Flexible Fuel Vehicles
Mods.Author: PPSz
Mods.Description:
Adds alternative fuels, alcohol for gas (two-stroke included) engines and oil for diesel engines
- Alcohol burns 50% faster than gas and oil burns twice as fast as diesel
- Fluids can be mixed in any proportion without performance reduction
- Fuel consumption will change proportionally to the amount of alternative fuel in the mix
- Two-stroke engines still require 3% oil in the mix, but oil will burn faster when used with alcohol
Mods.Changelog:
- Added settings to increase fuel consumption both for main fuels and alternate fuels
- Removed unnecessary debug logs

Mods.Name: Fuel Tanks Editor
Mods.Author: PPSz
Mods.Description:
Restart the game after changing values in mod menu (*M* key)
This mod allows you to set the max amount of fuel in a tank for cars without detachable fuel tanks
Before reaching 1000 km, you can't set more than double the default value

Mods.Name: Paintable Rims
Mods.Author: PPSz
Mods.Description: Allows you to paint rims and hubcaps
Mods.Changelog: half of the rims/hubcaps will have default metal texture, the other half will have painted metal texture (texture of the golf car to be precise)

Mods.Name: Higher Carryweight
Mods.Author: Rodney Dawn
Mods.Description: You are now very stronk and can lift so much weight!

Mods.Name: Background Autosave
Mods.Author: RUNDEN
Mods.Description:
This mod moves the autosave process to the background, preventing the game from hitching/freezing when it's saving.
To use this mod properly, be sure to fully disable the default autosave feature in your settings!
(One side effect of using this is that your autosaves will not generate a thumbnail image)

Mods.Name: ChaosMod
Mods.Author: M-
Mods.Description:
55 effects!
(Some good, some bad)

F2 - Start the chaos
F3 - Hard reset the mod
Shift + F2 - Open configuration
Keybinds can be changed from the pause screen

Timer length configurable
Individual effects can be toggled on or off
All settings will save

Mods.Name: Ammo Boxes
Mods.Author: PPSz
Mods.Description:
Tired of storing your precious ammunition in cardboard boxes or magazines? Time for ammo boxes that'll solve your struggles!
- Ak Ammo Boxes have a chance to replace cigarettes, other have a chance to replace vanilla ammo
- It's just a storage solution, not extra ammo spawns. That means:
 * Ak Ammo Boxes spawn empty
 * Other Ammo Boxes spawn with the same amount as if they were vanilla ammo containers
- Ammo Boxes can't be used to reload directly from the inventory
- Different color and icon for different ammo type
- Ammo capacity: 
 * Ak: 300 bullets
 * Revolver: 144 bullets
 * Shotgun: 72 shells
 * BB Gun: 2000 pellets
- Compatible with Pepesza mod (which includes its own Ammo Box)
- Adds Ammo Boxes for Karabiner and SgtJoe's Sniper. Ammo capacity:
* Karabiner: 100 bullets
* Sniper: 70 bullets
Mods.Changelog: Fixed issue with Ammo Boxes becoming huge, when attached to each other using Attach Everything mod

Mods.Name: Points of Interest
Mods.Author: SgtJoe
Mods.Description: Adds 17 brand new buildings and other POIs for you to explore and loot that will spawn alongside the vanilla ones.
Mods.Changelog: Working again

Mods.Name: Spas-12
Mods.Author: PPSz
Mods.Description:
Many are already familiar with the legendary Spas-12 shotgun. However, for those who aren’t, let me introduce you to this semi-automatic shotgun that can come in handy in sticky situations
- 3 variants: long, medium and short. For easy recognition, on top of the barrel length, the variants have following differences:
* Short has no stock and ironsight. Ammo capacity: 6. Widest spread
* Medium has stock and ironsight. Ammo capacity: 7. Moderate spread
* Long has stock and reflex sight: Ammo capacity: 8. Narrow spread (but still not as good as long double-barrel shotgun)

- Has a chance to replace vanilla shotguns of matching lengths
- Uses default shotgun ammunition
- Should be compatible with RUNDEN Updated Iron sight Mod
Mods.Changelog: Added inventory icons

Mods.Name: Karabiner
Mods.Author: PPSz
Mods.Description:
Karabiner, also known as Kar98k, is a powerful bolt-action rifle that's a must-have in a wasteland
- It has a chance to replace the vanilla BB Gun
- It has ammo capacity of 5 bullets
- There's a chance to get a sniper variant with working scope
- Should be compatible with RUNDEN Updated Iron sight Mod and SgtJoe's Sniper
Mods.Changelog: Fixed zoom when pressing *zoom* key on scoped version

Mods.Name: Pepesza
Mods.Author: PPSz
Mods.Description:
Introducing the Pepesza, a wasteland variant of the PPSh submachine gun.
With its rapid fire rate and generous ammo capacity of 71 bullets, it’s a powerful weapon that could be a great addition to your arsenal
- It has a chance to replace the vanilla AK
- It shoots faster than the AK, but does a little bit less damage per bullet
- Pepesza can jam when you shoot. The chance of jamming depends on the magazine condition and slightly less on the weapon condition
- To fix a jam, you have to unload the magazine and reload. You can also try to click the fire button, it can work too
- Weapon jamming can be disabled in ModLoader settings
- There is a second type of magazine: the banana mag. It holds 35 bullets, but it jams less often
- The magazines have different conditions, however you cannot clean them
- The magazines have different fire rates. The cleaner the magazine, the faster it shoots. The fire rate can range from 650 RPM to 950 RPM
- This adds up to hundred of unique magazine variants. Good luck finding the best one
- There's a chance to replace cigarettes with ammo boxes that can store up to 355 bullets
- Ammo boxes can be used to refill the magazines (pepesza can't be reloaded directly from the ammo box)
- Should be compatible with RUNDEN Updated Iron sight Mod
Mods.Changelog:
- Fixed a bug where magazines unloaded from Ak could change to Pepesza mags on reload
- Added inventory icons

Mods.Name: Sniper Rifle
Mods.Author: SgtJoe
Mods.Description: Replaces the BB gun with a high power bolt action rifle. To use the scope, you must also install the *Updated Iron Sights* mod. Fully compatible with my Gunslinger mod. Open/close the cap on the scope to switch between scoped aiming and ironsights aiming.

Mods.Name: Speed-sensitive Steering
Mods.Author: PPSz
Mods.Description:
This mod reduces the maximum steering angle as the speed increases, enabling you to take sharp turns at low speeds and stay in control at high speeds.
You can also adjust the speed at which the assistance kicks in, the speed at which the steering angle stops decreasing, and the minimum sensitivity in the mod loader settings.

For a better experience, you can increase the keyboard steering sensitivity.
Mods.Changelog: Made some optimizations, improved sliders in mod settings

Mods.Name: Gunslinger Gear
Mods.Author: SgtJoe
Mods.Description:
Allows you to carry all five weapon types in the game including ammo without taking up inventory space. This mod is highly hotkey based, check the rest of the description.
Pressing these keys will allow equip/holster the following:
5 - Revolver
6 - Shotgun
7 - BB Gun
8 - AK
9 - AK Magazine
0 - Melee Weapon
To access the belt and bandolier ammo reserves, look down at them until you see a number pop up on screen, then you can fill/empty them like normal ammo boxes.
All keybinds are customizable in the mod settings, where you can enable/disable certain equipment as well.

Mods.Name: Informative Radio
Mods.Author: SgtJoe
Mods.Description: The black FM/AM radio will now have a digital display that tells you the current frequency, station name, and song title. You can customize the display color in the mod settings menu.

Mods.Name: Get Drunk
Mods.Author: SgtJoe
Mods.Description: Drinking alcohol will now make you get drunk and eventually fall asleep, bypassing the cooldown.
Mods.Changelog:
- Fixed camera behavior inside of vehicles
- Added option to disable camera rotation

Mods.Name: Beefy Munkas
Mods.Author: SgtJoe
Mods.Description: The wasteland cannibals are now faster and much stronger, you'll need a melee weapon or a large amount of bullets to bring them down!
Mods.Changelog: Fixed their health going higher than intended when saving/loading before killing them

Mods.Name: Medkit
Mods.Author: SgtJoe
Mods.Description: Consume this item to heal all your wounds! Has a 10% chance to replace bacon.

Mods.Name: Cardboard boxes
Mods.Author: Kuri
Mods.Description:
Sometimes replacing saddlebags, there are a total of 11 kinds of boxes in different sizes. 
Assets are included in the DLL

Mods.Name: Tesla Merkur
Mods.Author: RalphCZ
Mods.Description: Replaces television to old portable Czechoslovak Tesla Merkur

Mods.Name: Human AI (Addon)
Mods.Author: SgtJoe
Mods.Description:
|| WON'T WORK WITHOUT THE TRAFFIC AI MOD || 
AI Traffic will now be driven by humans instead of pumpkins! Fully compatible with my Patrol and Technical mods!
Mods.Changelog: Fixed AI police sirens not turning off when the driver dies

Mods.Name: Simple Weather
Mods.Author: SgtJoe
Mods.Description: Adds purely cosmetic Rain, Snow, and Fog that have a small chance of happening each day.

Mods.Name: Speed Or Boom
Mods.Author: Fat Rat
Mods.Description:
Activate/Deactivate the gamemode with P while sitting in a car. Once you pass 80 km/h don't slow down or you blow up! 
Indicator at the top left shows speed and bomb status. Red = Mode Off, Green = Mode On, Blue = Bomb Active

Mods.Name: Soviet Jeep
Mods.Author: SgtJoe
Mods.Description: Replaces the Dacia with the 1943 GAZ-67, the Soviet answer to the Willys MB. The engine requires 3% oil in the gas tank, and the cap is on top in front of the windshield.
Mods.Changelog:
- Changed vehicle handling and engine stats
- Fixed engine not requiring oil
- Increased canvas top spawn chance from 25% to 40%
- Fixed vehicle body appearing invisible
- Added new engine audio courtesy of RUNDEN

Mods.Name: Vehicle Deterioration
Mods.Author: M-
Mods.Description:
Vehicles now get dirtier as you drive along.

Rusty parts have a chance to fall off, poor condition wheels have a chance to explode.

Best keep that vehicle clean!

Mods.Name: Badger's Rotary Engine
Mods.Author: Nicrobe, Tumpy_Noodles & Jessica
Mods.Description:
A rotary engine based on the VAZ-411 Twin-Rotor made by Lada. It has a chance to replace the engine for Lada 2105.
Made with immense amount of trial and error, alongside the invaluable help from Kolben, Tumpy_Noodles, Jessica, M-, RUNDEN, RUNDEN, RUNDEN, RUNDEN and The Sabii. You are all brilliant and have patience of saints <3

Mods.Name: GAZ-24 - Volga
Mods.Author: Ares, Kuri, Jessica
Mods.Description:
I barely fixed it, but now it
fully replaces 2101,
don't want to suffer with
parts mismatching and so on


It's GAZ-24 -Volga-, another Soviet car.
I haven't checked compatibility with AI TRAFFIC,
but it doesn't conflict critically with Sabi's hoods.
It has a large number of flaws, well, you'll have to excuse me.
I was hesitant to release it for a long time and finally did it.

Mods.Name: Portable Turret
Mods.Author: Kuri_ (orig. by SgtJoe)
Mods.Description:

May have an issues (ESPECIALLY WITH THE CENTER OF MASS!), please do not report it :3

(sometimes replaces a wooden chair-)

Mods.Name: SpawnerTLD Pause Menu
Mods.Author: M-
Mods.Description:
Spawn any vehicle or item

Main menu 'Distance Driven' must be 1000km or more to work

Open the menu with F1 by default. This can be rebound from the pause menu

Legacy mode available which looks more like the old spawner, activate from the pause menu
Mods.Changelog:
- Added colour eyedropper (thanks for the suggestion Cerulean!)

- Accessible from 'Miscellaneous' tab

- Allows colour to be copied from any vehicle

- Copied colour is automatically put as the current colour in the configuration
 
- Allows the colour in the configuration to be pasted to other vehicles
- Added object resizer

- Accessible from 'Miscellaneous' tab

- Controls are adjustable via the settings

- By default when active, look at an object and left click to make it bigger, right click to make it smaller
- Added vehicle configuration tab

- Allows for configuration of the vehicle you're currently sitting in

- Adds vehicle godmode option (thanks for the suggestion SgtJoe!)

- Adds fluid controls for currently mounted radiator, oil and fuel


- Includes a button to fill the vehicle with the correct fuel for the installed engine (thanks for the suggestion Jessica!)

- Allows changing of the vehicle condition

- Allows changing of the vehicle colour

- Allows changing of the golf sunroof colour including custom colours


- These apply to the current vehicle, not the part itself, but will persist when saved



- This means if the part is unmounted it will go back to it's original colour when saved and reloaded

- Allows changing of the vehicle window colour


- These also apply to the current vehicle, not the individual parts, but will persist when saved the same as the sunroof colours

Mods.Name: Long Road Patrol
Mods.Author: SgtJoe
Mods.Description:
Join the force and help clean up the streets!

THIS MOD REQUIRES 'AI TRAFFIC' (RUNDEN_AI.DLL) TO WORK PROPERLY

How To Use: 
1. The red flatcap has been replaced with a police hat. Find one and put it on for the mod to be enabled.
2. Press F3 when sitting inside a regular car to turn it into a police cruiser.
3. Press 8 to toggle the lights, 9 for the sirens, and 7 for both.
4. Arrest/Release AI suspects by aiming at their seat and pressing F2.
5. When inside a car and in first person, aim at an AI car and press F2 to request backup from the AI police.

Mods.Name: Gunfire Damages Vehicles
Mods.Author: SgtJoe
Mods.Description:
Shooting vehicle parts will now cause them to fall off! 
This is a rewrite of Poppable Tires with vastly superior hit detection and added features. No more accidental pops!
Mods.Changelog: MOD REWRITTEN

Mods.Name: Hardcore Start
Mods.Author: SgtJoe
Mods.Description:
You get nothing but four wheels, an engine, and your license plates. Everything else must be found on the road. 
Can you survive this challenge and restore your car to its full glory?

Mods.Name: Wristwatch
Mods.Author: SgtJoe
Mods.Description: While on foot and not holding anything in your hands, hold down Right Alt to check the current time.

Mods.Name: Better Headlights
Mods.Author: Tumpy_Noodles
Mods.Description:
LED bulbs for your cars

-White interior and reverse lights
-White headlights (work only if spawned)
-Increased range (500 low /1000 high)
This is a work in progress .

Mods.Name: Liquid Distiller
Mods.Author: SgtJoe
Mods.Description:
Gas Canisters will have a small chance to spawn as a Liquid Distiller that will allow you to separate fluid mixtures into individual liquids.

HOW TO USE:
1. Open the cap and pour in a mixture of any liquid
2. Press the button to select the liquid you want to filter out
3. Attach any fluid container to the distiller hose

Mods.Name: Ignition Powered Radios
Mods.Author: SgtJoe
Mods.Description: Vehicle radios will now automatically turn on/off alongside your vehicle ignition.

Mods.Name: Dirtifier
Mods.Author: SgtJoe
Mods.Description: Jizz-On-It bottles now have a 25% chance to spawn as a pure brown variant which will make things dirtier/rustier instead of cleaner!

Mods.Name: Technical
Mods.Author: SgtJoe
Mods.Description: Replaces the Caddy passenger seat with a mounted machine gun that you can fire with the left mouse button. Also removes the collision from the rear window so you can enter the gun directly from the driver seat.
Mods.Changelog: - Added compatibility with the AI mod

Mods.Name: Diesel 2101
Mods.Author: Rodney Dawn
Mods.Description:
adds a diesel version of the 2101 engine.  it has a 1 in 5 chance of spawning in place of the standard 2101 engine.
6l oil capacity, increased heat, increased torque, 3100rpm max.
Mods.Changelog:
tweaked to be more compatible with other 2101 engine mods
Increased torque, fuel, and oil consumption again,
decreased rpm, increased heat generation, tuned engine pitch to sound like a diesel
6l oil capacity, roughly equal to gas vw golf engine in torque, tops out at much lower rpm.  works well with turbo mod.

Mods.Name: Un-Flip Your Car
Mods.Author: SgtJoe
Mods.Description: If you ever find yourself upside down, you can now press F2 to automatically set your car on its wheels instead of having to get out and mess with the janky pushing system.

Mods.Name: Tumpy_Diesel_i6
Mods.Author: Tumpy_Noodles
Mods.Description:
-Caterpillar Diesel i6 engine
-Custom Model & Textures
-Replaces 1/2 all IFA Engines
-Comes in 5 sizes. Larger = more fuel and oil consumption
-Scaled to and Perform like real counterparts. With half nm and double rpms
-From 7.2L ~2x IFA. To 18.1L ~6.5x IFA.
-Side Oil Cap acts like a bottom oil cap. Sorry.
-NOT COMPATIBLE WITH BLOOD ENGINES

Planned for Final Release:
-Custom Sounds!!!!!
-Bottom oil cap working properly
-Make it compatible with Bus
-Larger oil capacity cause why not

Mods.Name: More Fridges
Mods.Author: Kuri and Sabi
Mods.Description: Adds multiple sizes for fridges (single door only)

Mods.Name: Industrial v8 Engines
Mods.Author: Rodney Dawn
Mods.Description: This is the industrial Diesel V8 I've been working on.  It is a port of Serena's V8 engine, and all credit goes to Jessica for all the hard work.  I just wrote some additional code, and adjusted the engine parameters to suit its new role.   This is functional as a standalone, but is intended as a companion to the original mod, Serena's V8 engine.What this does is adds the possibility for Industrial sized diesel V8's to spawn as bus and truck engines.  These range in size from 7.3 to 14L displacement, and are intended for heavy vehicles (Bus and truck)  so they will be extremely slow in regular cars (except the Fury because of its gearing it can do 160kph with the largest of these engines , the 14L version.)Due to the IFA gearing the IFA gets too fast in 5th gear, so stick to 4th to avoid erratic handling.Bus works flawlessly, and tops out around the top of its speedometer just barely on flat ground.These run hot so be sure to have a clean radiator full of pure water or blood
Mods.Changelog:
fixes a number of issues, sets the spawn chance to 50 percent, and tweaks the torque curve to approximate real detroit-diesel 'screamin' jimmy' engines.
 power equivalents range from naturally aspirated 6v-53 to twin turbo 20v-149.  these engines guzzle fuel, make a lot of noise, and smoke, but they also make big power.
(Special thanks to Molly Dawn for the torque curves)
No longer alters the final drive ratio, and should now be fully compatible with turbos, superchargers, and nitrous.
has a fifty percent chance of replacing the bus engine.
5.0L to 14L size
Increased fuel consumption over previous version
Fuel consumption now scales more realistically with engine size.
Tweaked the alap rpm so they sort of sound like a two-stroke diesel V8
(just need to update the existing mod on the workshop to this version, version 3.0.0.0  the thumbnail is still valid, as the engine looks the same as before. there are no cosmetic changes only functionality changes.)
Custom sounds, Model and texture belong to Serena/Jessica.  I only rewrote some of the code. (approx. 40 percent by this final update),

Mods.Name: Kuri's Fuel Tanks
Mods.Author: Kuri
Mods.Description:
This mod adds the ability to put fuel tanks on cars. 
Yes, cars won't have their own gas tanks now, you'll have to find one and attach it to the car with physlock (Sometimes a fuel tank from Jawa will spawn in the starter home, so, you can use it as a temporary gas tank for your car). 
You can't have more than one fuel tank (the one that was put in last after you clicked on the cap will be used). 
To attach the fuel tank to the car, put it in the car (be sure to use the physlock) and then press the cap on the car.
 Instructions are included below.

Variations of new gas tanks have also been added
Mods.Changelog: Test

Mods.Name: Barkas Trailer Hitch
Mods.Author: Jessica
Mods.Description:
Adds a trailer hitch to the Barkas van and flatbed variants

Important note: be careful with the tailgate on the flatbed while you have a trailer attached, moving it down too far and clipping it into the trailer can cause physics to freak out!
Mods.Changelog: Test

Mods.Name: Better Trabant Sound
Mods.Author: RalphCZ
Mods.Description: This mod is replacing original Trabant sound with better
Mods.Changelog: Test

Mods.Name: Consistent Odometers
Mods.Author: SgtJoe
Mods.Description: All odometers in all vehicles will now display the total kilometers traveled in that save file.
Mods.Changelog: - Fixed performance decrease caused by conflict with the AI mod

Mods.Name: Speedometer mod
Mods.Author: Kuri
Mods.Description:
A mod that adds something like a digital speedometer. Attach it to your car with physlock to make it work (and turn on the ignition, of course)
(It replaces Plymouth Fury radio sometimes)
Mods.Changelog: just a minor fix

Mods.Name: explosives mod
Mods.Author: Kuri
Mods.Description:
This mod adds three new types of explosives - dynamite, grenade and nitroglycerin.

(Nitroglycerin is very fragile, it can explode literally in your hands)

Thanks Tumpy_Noodles for the nitroglycerin model
Mods.Changelog: Test

Mods.Name: Luxury Golf Engines
Mods.Author: Kuri, NICULL
Mods.Description:
-Changed and balanced torque curve of both engines, based off the real 1983 top end engine models offered for the mk1 golfs.
-Adjusted the pitch of both engine sounds
-Reversed oil consumption, the diesel engine is now more oil efficient, the petrol engine is less oil efficient
-Adjusted max oil tank capacity of both engines, Petrol engine now holds 6L of oil and the Diesel engine now hold 5L
-Both engines now do not stall at idle in 1st gear on flat terrain, it is infact recommended to start accelerating from idle in first gear on both engines in order to avoid loss of traction. (Manual transmission is recommended with this mod)
-The Petrol engine now makes 156nm of torque at 4600rpm and the Diesel engine now makes 140nm of torque at 2500rpm (Just like the real models) But the torque curves have been slightly altered and adjusted for how game simulates cars, in order to also reach the real top speed of these engines.
-Torque curves shown in the mod's page on the discord for the game
-New Engine sound and idle sound for the petrol golf engine
Mods.Changelog:
-Changed and balanced torque curve of both engines, based off the real 1983 top end engine models offered for the mk1 golfs.
-Adjusted the pitch of both engine sounds
-Reversed oil consumption, the diesel engine is now more oil efficient, the petrol engine is less oil efficient
-Adjusted max oil tank capacity of both engines, Petrol engine now holds 6L of oil and the Diesel engine now hold 5L
-Both engines now do not stall at idle in 1st gear on flat terrain, it is infact recommended to start accelerating from idle in first gear on both engines in order to avoid loss of traction. (Manual transmission is recommended with this mod)
-The Petrol engine now makes 156nm of torque at 4600rpm and the Diesel engine now makes 140nm of torque at 2500rpm (Just like the real models) But the torque curves have been slightly altered and adjusted for how game simulates cars, in order to also reach the real top speed of these engines.
-Torque curves shown in the mod's page on the discord for the game
-New Engine sound and idle sound for the petrol golf engine

Mods.Name: Diesel Engines Remaster
Mods.Author: Kuri, NICULL
Mods.Description:
IMPORTANT NOTE! REMOVE ALL OF YOUR OLD DIESEL ENGINE MODS BEFORE INSTALLING THIS ONE!
ANOTHER IMPORTANT NOTE! This mod is only confirmed to be compatible with our other Luxury Golf Engines mod.

Driving across the desert in my brand new luxury engined golf, stumbled across a ship full of these bad bois inside.
They look quite familiar, yet sound so different?
They kinda look a little bigger too!

After 5 years on the east coast, it was time to drop a new diesel engines mod, this time its ALL the diesel engines we have ever made into one mod. 6 new engine variants of the vanilla engines to mess around with.
-New sounds
-Different engine sizes
-Compatible with Luxury Engines Mod

Big thanks to Kuri and Tumpy_Noodles for making this possible, also a special thanks to ghaleas and runden for the original mod from years ago.

updaet 1.1.0.3
-torque curves of the v8s and tdi engines are changed
-oil consumption of v8's and tdi engines is increased
-New startup sound for v8s
-Attempted to balance audio volumes
-Balanced pitch volumes

Mods.Name: Kuri's Portable Radio!
Mods.Author: Kuri
Mods.Description:
This mod adds something like a radio, which can sometimes appear instead of the usual one. It also shows the coordinates, the time and the current track playing!

- There is a battery charge and the batteries themselves (to change the battery of the radio, just bring the battery close to it)
- You can skip a track by pressing the red button
- There is an opportunity to change the interface theme, to do this, click on the black button
- Press the green button to quickly turn on Custom Radio
- and... one of the most interesting things, in my opinion. To turn on the car mode, attach the radio to the car with the physlock and press the orange button. It will display pretty much all the information about the car!
- There are several sizes of radio available, as well as two colors, black and white.
- There is also a standby mode, which the radio goes into if the player doesn't hold it for a long time.

There are some bugs, I am aware of them and MAY be fixing them soon. Please DO NOT report them.

Mods.Name: Roblox Cars
Mods.Author: RUNDEN
Mods.Description: Makes the cars all roblox-y

Mods.Name: Make fluids visible
Mods.Author: RUNDEN
Mods.Description: Small simple mod that just makes it so you can see the liquid that's in a bucket

Mods.Name: No Grotesque Content

Mods.Description: Removes feces, severed limbs, and sex dolls from the game world. Also permanently empties the defecation meter so you can use the eating mechanic in peace. Does not apply immediately after starting a new game, you have to save and load first.
Mods.Changelog: - Fixed broken Mod Config

Mods.Name: Fuck Off Cactus
Mods.Author: Jessica
Mods.Description: Just a simple mod that makes all cactus gibs nonphysical so that instead of getting stuck in your car on impact, they just fall right out of the world.

Mods.Name: NO TumbleWeeds
Mods.Author: Tumpy_Noodles
Mods.Description:
- Removes the tumbleweed script so new weeds won't spawn in
- Tumbleweeds no longer save.
- If they are already saved. Load save. Save. Load new save. Magically now gone.....
- If you have a potato computer this might help with fps. No guarantees.
V2.1

- Default setting is 250. (My computer was capable of 1500)

Mods.Name: Beetle Trailer Hitch
Mods.Author: Jessica
Mods.Description: Enables the currently hidden trailer hitch on the Beetle, includes both the hardtop and softtop variants.

Mods.Name: Attach preview
Mods.Author: RUNDEN
Mods.Description:
a little helper mod to make attaching things with G in the right place a little bit easier

it does this by making a little live preview of where the item you're trying to attach will go

it helps if you hold Right Click and move the mouse to the left or right before trying to mount stuff, since then you can see the little ghost preview thing easier.

Mods.Name: Attach EVERYTHING
Mods.Author: Kuri
Mods.Description:
Greatly optimized the mod.
A problem with saves has been fixed. Now attached things retain their state even after reloading the save!

A mod that allows you to attach all items to everything.

If something is not attachable, try reloading the save
Can sometimes cause lag, but I'm not sure
Mods.Changelog: Now the problem with the trailers is definitely fixed.

Mods.Name: Better AM Radio
Mods.Author: RalphCZ
Mods.Description:
With this mod, AM frequency spacing is Europan (9 kHz) and you can use Longwave band.

AM frequency range is 153 - 1602 kHz.

1.2 Changelog: Added noise to AM stations. 1332 frequency changed to 234.

Mods.Name: Plymouth Fury Cabriolet

Mods.Description:

There is a slight issue with regular fury doors spawning on the Cabrio version of the Plymouth, but we don't know how to fix this. You will most likely need to find doors to match yours, or spawn them in.

Kuri is a qt

Mods.Name: Vented Hoods
Mods.Author: Sabi and Kuri
Mods.Description:
!May be a bit broken: the models are occasionally really large on spawn 

Adds 4 new vented hoods to the game, so that the Plymouth's V8 engine fits into the engine bay of each car.

Special thanks to Jessica, Runden and subG for helping us in the making of this mod.

Mods.Name: faster walking
Mods.Author: Sabi
Mods.Description:
increases the character speed by about 50%

send lots of love to Kuri who has helped me in making this mod

Mods.Name: Kuri QoL improvements
Mods.Author: Kuri
Mods.Description:
This is an extended version of container mod (FOR CORRECT WORK OF THE MOD REMOVE CONTAINER MOD!!!).

I have been working on this mod for a very long time, there are variations of many things like beds, trophies, weapons, chairs, etc.

Here is a small list of changes:

Mods.Name: Blood Engines for the VW Gold and VW Caddy
Mods.Author: Rodney Dawn
Mods.Description:
May be integrated into original mod in a future release, but for now it is standalone.

Only the caddy Gas engine will be changed!
Mods.Changelog:
No longer requires blood in the engine, just use oil
Higher rpm
tweaked heat a bit
Should be more compatible with other mods that change the diesel variant of the vw golf engine and perfectly compatible with those that change the gas variant as this now only has a chance to replace the diesel variant.
Better turbo support
Barkas drivetrain compatible, now you can swap the two stroke out with a blood engine and actually go faster than 130km/h
tweaked the pitch a bit, and increased smoke rate slightly
various other minor tweaks to improve compatibility and overall usability.
Has more torque and higher rpm than either the gas or diesel VW golf engines, but balances this with higher fuel consumption, more heat generation, and using a rarer fuel.
(good for limping buses too but not so much for the ifa due to the high rpm making for unstable speeds).

Mods.Name: Less Violent Crashes
Mods.Author: Sabi
Mods.Description:
This mod prevents a few car parts from falling off to make crashes less of a problem. It does NOT prevent the rest of the car parts from falling far away from the car, it still depends on how hard you crash & whether you go flying or not.

Especially useful for long journeys. Spare parts are not as important, but it's still worth keeping some wheels with you.

Mods.Name: Diesel Beetle Engine
Mods.Author: Rodney Dawn
Mods.Description:
This adds a chance for the VW beetle to spawn with a diesel engine, and a chance for the diesel version of the beetle engine to spawn whenever a beetle engine normally spawns.

Features increased torque and lower RPM
Increased oil consumption
6L oil capacity

Mods.Name: Blood Engines mod
Mods.Author: Rodney Dawn
Mods.Description:
The first release of my Blood engines mod.
What it does:
Adds blood fueled engines as possible spawns for the Fury and the IFA

Conflicts: None known.  Tested and compatible with AI cars and every engine mod on the workshop.
AI cars /do/ properly spawn with blood in the tank, so finding Christine while hitchiking is entirely possible

Uses blood as fuel
More heat generation
Harder starting
More oil consumption
More fuel consumption
666NM torque
Rpms are a compromise. a tad slow for the Fury topping at 210kph, and a bit fast for the IFA but perfectly driveable in both
6.6L oil capacity
Red color
Mods.Changelog:
Improved compatibility with other mods changing the fury engine.
MUCH improved sound, (despite still using in game assets)
Slightly retuned powerband, to improve functionality with turbo and supercharger together, or either one alone.
Increased oil consumption slightly,
slightly reduced fuel consumption,
Reduced idle rpm slightly,
slightly increased heat production, and increased shutdown temp by 5 degrees.
Increased engine volume a bit. (enough to hear it from inside a bus, but not enough to interfere with other in game sounds, in game radio, or custom radio.
Tweaked smoke rate to give a bit more of that colorful red mist

Mods.Name: Simple Coin Mod

Mods.Name: dingus

Mods.Description: maxwell the carryable cat™️.

Do you hate when your radio is cut off and interrupted? Ever find the level of interruption annoying, or just too loud? Are you satisfied with the sounds of peace and quiet? The wind whirring as you drive your car, clean or not, down a finite, deserted, asphalt-covered treasure trove? The faint lyrics to 'My Baby Has a White Škoda as you sleep in the bed of a nice, comfortable bunker? The audible arguments between the hosts of SteelPants Radio and Neon Synth playing over the radio?

WELL BOY CAN THESE 2 LINES OF CODE BE POWERFUL

 it was not tested in multiplayers, so keep expectations low

Mods.Name: Electric Motors Mod
Mods.Author: xspeedasx
Mods.Description:
This mod adds electric motors to The Long Drive that can be mounted to any vehicle instead of internal combustion engines.
Disclaimer: It does change the transmission of the car it is put into to only have one gear!

Some useful information:
* There are 5 performance variants, revving from 10,000 (cyan) to 20,000 rpm (red)!
* Its not required, but advisable to add water to both radiator and fuel tank to cool the motor.
* Vehicles won't use any gas, oil or diesel, but there must be something in the tank due to TLD limitations (Genesz pls fix).Changelog:
-Added compatibility with the VeeAyteEnjin a.k.a. Jessica's V8
- Improved compatibility with the RUNDENautomatic mod - allows motors to have multiple gears when car is automatic.
- Gave more juice to BUS (400%), IFA (400%) and Fury (150%), but also more heat gain - it's still quite unbalanced and needs more tweaking
- Removed unnecessary shameful code left over from weeks of debugging

* tip: To go forwards in automatic, first set gear lever to R position, reach ~20km/h in reverse and start mashing gears all the way from P to 1 and back few times, until it locks into 1, then choose D and accelerate.

Known Issues:
1. Newly spawned Dacias and Dacia Kombis such as starting car, ai cars, and spawner cars might have the wrong trunk attached. It should be fixed by saving and loading. Naturally spawning cars shouldn't do this.
2. License plate will rotate downward when reloaded. You can unattach it and reattach it to correct it.
